title: XForge Knowledge File (Markdown frontmatter)
description: Validates YAML-style frontmatter in .xforge/knowledge/**/*.md. Schema reflects the REAL format used by 177 existing files: id, type, tags, owner, version, updated. Optional fields are optional. type accepts all observed values (English + Portuguese) without restriction.

type.description: Knowledge type — free-form. Observed values: knowledge, conhecimento, pattern, padrao, fluxo, glossary, domain, dominio, resumo, projeto, arquitetura, architecture, auth, frontend, database, tech-stack, multi-tenancy, compliance

domain.description: Optional — usually derived from parent directory
